creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
In the meantime the 3.0.0 release has happened. It is the official
successor for the prerelease version 2.9.x.

I tried to patch Mk/bsd.wx.mk to put version 3.0 in and version 2.9 out.

The port x11-toolkits/wxgtk30 should supersede x11-toolkits/wxgtk29.

Stage support is not implemented yet.

I am not sure if it also could be useful to deinstall 2.9.4_1 first and
than install 3.0.0.? If this is right, should one mention it in
/usr/ports/UPDATING?

This wxgtk version is important to fix math/saga in some points. An
update for math/saga is in preparation.
